sector_summary: The technology sector (XLK) shows strong relative strength and medium confidence, making it a top choice. The energy sector (XLE) also has medium confidence despite negative price momentum. Consumer staples (XLP) and healthcare (XLV) have conflicting signals between price and news, which reduces their attractiveness. Financials (XLF) and industrials (XLI) are weak and should be avoided.
